programme.title: Paradise Lost-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Fijian island where they battle the elements. S02 E04.

programme.title: Meltdown in Bolivia-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped into the merciless jungles of Bolivia. S02 E07.

programme.title: The Pain Forest-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to endure 21 days in the Malaysian rainforest. S02 E06.

programme.title: Hearts of Darkness-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Strangers pair up to survive the dangers of the forest, naked and afraid. S03 E04.

programme.title: Blood in the Water-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Dani and Justine test their skills on Andros Island where their partnership turns sour. S03 E03.

programme.title: Pick Your Poison-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to survive in Brazil for 21 days with no food, water or clothes. S09 E10.

programme.title: Survive The Job
programme.desc: Tony digs deep to chase a record-breaking gold haul and Rick is missing in action.

programme.title: Into the Wild With Bear Grylls and Akshay Kumar
programme.desc: Akshay Kumar joins survivalist Bear Grylls as they tackle the forests of India.

programme.title: Cuetzaln-Dual Survival Colombia
programme.desc: Daniel Tirado and Alberto Pegueros use expert skills to escape a narrow cave system. S01 E06.

programme.title: Belize-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear emulates the personality of Tarzan as he navigates through the jungles of Belize. S03 E06.

programme.title: Man Eating Crocs-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario faces some of the most dangerous man-eating crocodiles on the planet. S02 E01.

programme.title: Namibian Desert Oryx-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou heads to the middle of the Namib Desert in Namibia to hunt the desert oryx. S02 E02.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: Man Woman Child Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Ed Stafford moves to a remote desert island with his wife and son for a month.

programme.title: Dominican Republic-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: The intrepid adventurer travels to the Dominican Republic during hurricane season. S03 E09.

programme.title: Hawaii Access: Shane Dorian-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The Axis deer populations in Hawaii have reached an uncontrollable scale. S02 E07.

programme.title: Vietnam-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles rocky terrain and deadly creatures deep in the heart of Vietnam. S04 E03.

programme.title: Backcountry Ice Man: Chuck Liddell-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S02 E09.

programme.title: Man Eating Crocs-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario faces some of the most dangerous man-eating crocodiles on the planet. S02 E01.

programme.title: Energy Frontline: Japan
programme.desc: Energy Frontline: Japan

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E08.

programme.title: The Walk
programme.desc: A man attempts to walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center on a tightrope.

programme.title: Knives Out on Day One-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: A pair of competitors are sent home on day one after a blade challenge. S02 E01.

programme.title: Dung Deal-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Survivalists search elephant dung and test their bushing skills in a bird trap challenge. S02 E02.
